channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Gaza mourns four killed in Israeli strike
item.description: Cries of grief echoed through Gaza City for four Palestinians killed near the Jabalia refugee camp in northern Gaza.

item.title: Violence erupts during anti-G7 protests in Geneva on eve of summit
item.description: Violence erupts during anti-G7 protests in Geneva on eve of summit.

item.title: Swiss right-wing plan to cap population rejected by narrow margins
item.description: Swiss voters reject a proposed population cap that would cap the country’s population at 10 million.

item.title: Medical teams in Goma face mistrust from relatives of Ebola victims
item.description: Confirmed Ebola cases in the Democratic Republic of Congo have spiked up to 782.

item.title: Six people killed as helicopters collide over Brazil’s Rio de Janeiro
item.description: Two helicopters collided in midair before crashing into car park of electric vehicle dealership, fire service says.

item.title: Lewis Hamilton wins first F1 race with Ferrari in Barcelona
item.description: Seven-time world champion's maiden victory for the Italian manufacturer is also his first F1 win in nearly two years.

item.title: The president, the billionaires and the news
item.description: A media industry weakened by marauding billionaires is dealing with a US president eager to bend it further.

item.title: Twelve killed in plane crash in US state of Missouri
item.description: Plane crashes near Butler Memorial Airport near Kansas City, with authorities reporting skydivers on board.

item.title: Germany hit Curacao for seven to open their World Cup
item.description: Four-time winners Germany thrash World Cup debutants Curacao 7-1 in their first group game on Sunday.

item.title: Israel welcomes Somaliland president in ‘historic’ visit
item.description: Israel hosted Somaliland's President on a landmark visit to Jerusalem after recognising it as an independent state.

item.title: Israel expands military control in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria by 1,000sq km
item.description: AJ probe: Israel expands military control by 1,000sq km on three fronts, using land grabs to mask strategic failures.

item.title: ‘Losing three years set us back 20’: Palestinian football’s future in peril
item.description: The suspended Palestinian league is squeezing a generation of footballers, with little certainty about the future.

item.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
item.description: Trump has commented on Truth Social, condemning Israeli attacks on Beirut as the cease fire is to be extended.

item.title: Ibram X. Kendi: Is the US inherently racist?
item.description: Has America failed to confront its racial past? Ibram X. Kendi on race, identity and the anti-racism backlash.

item.title: Is the G7 still relevant?
item.description: G7 country leaders meet in France this week for their annual summit amid changing geopolitical dynamics.

item.title: Thousands protest as Trump, other world leaders set to meet for G7 summit
item.description: Activists rally in Geneva to denounce policies of G7 countries ahead of group's annual meeting this week in France.

item.title: Al Jazeera reports from Israeli attack site in southern Beirut
item.description: Al Jazeera reports from the site of an Israeli attack on a residential building in southern Beirut.

item.title: Knicks fans set bus alight during celebrations
item.description: Footage shows a World Cup shuttle bus set into flames amid chaotic celebrations following Knicks NBA win.

item.title: Analyst says what attacks on Lebanon could mean for potential US-Iran deal
item.description: Israeli affairs analyst Dan Perry explains how the US, Israel and Iran may react as they get closer to an agreement.

item.title: LIVE: Netherlands vs Japan – World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow our live build-up, with full team news coverage, ahead of our live text commentary stream.

item.title: ‘Unacceptable’: London protesters slam illegal Israeli settlement land sale
item.description: Demonstrators denounce event promoting Israeli settlement land and property sales as a violation of international law.

item.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian oil tanker accused of funding Ukraine war
item.description: British armed forces intercepted an oil tanker believed to be part of Russia’s sanctioned shadow fleet.

item.title: Trump makes endorsement in key Georgia Republican US Senate run-off
item.description: Trump picks Mike Collins over Derek Dooley in race to determine who will face Democrat Jon Ossoff in November midterms.

item.title: Trump condemns Israel’s attack on Beirut as Iran says US responsible
item.description: Trump calls for no more attacks, says deal to end war still close, as Iranian officials vow strong response.

item.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
item.description: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
